name: agent-ayan
description: Ayan.ai — Unified Intelligence Hub with Industry Spokes

scripts.dev:help: echo 'Near-instant dev workflow:' && echo '  1) One-time boot:        npm run dev:bootstrap' && echo '  2) Daily start:          npm run dev:up' && echo '  3) Admin only:           npm run dev:admin' && echo '  4) Admin deps changed:   npm run dev:admin:rebuild' && echo '  5) Quiz only:            npm run dev:quiz' && echo '  6) Quiz deps changed:    npm run dev:quiz:rebuild' && echo '  7) Simulator only:       npm run dev:simulator' && echo '  8) Simulator deps change:npm run dev:simulator:rebuild' && echo '' && echo 'Use compose.full --build only for full-stack image rebuild workflows.'
scripts.dev:admin:rebuild: docker compose -f docker/compose.dev.yml build edu-admin && docker compose -f docker/compose.dev.yml up -d --no-deps edu-admin
scripts.dev:quiz:rebuild: docker compose -f docker/compose.dev.yml build edu-quiz && docker compose -f docker/compose.dev.yml up -d --no-deps edu-quiz
scripts.dev:simulator:rebuild: docker compose -f docker/compose.dev.yml build edu-simulator && docker compose -f docker/compose.dev.yml up -d --no-deps edu-simulator
